selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 变化, 找回的零钱, 找头, 更换；vt. 改变, 更换, 兑换
words.definition: n. an event that occurs when something passes from one state or phase to another

words.translation: a. 完全的, 十足的, 完成的；vt. 完成, 完工, 使圆满
words.definition: v. come or bring to a finish or an end; others finished in over 4 hours"

words.translation: n. 盖子, 封面, 藉口；vt. 覆盖, 掩饰, 保护, 掩护, 包括
words.definition: n. the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 落下, 瀑布, 采伐量, 下降, 落差, 降低, 堕落, 秋天；vi. 倒下, 落下, 来临, 失守, 阵亡, 下跌, 减弱, 倾斜, 垮台, 轮到, 变成, 降低
words.definition: n. the season when the leaves fall from the trees

words.translation: n. 恐怖, 害怕, 担心；v. 害怕, 恐惧, 为...担心, 敬畏
words.definition: n. an emotion experienced in anticipation of some specific pain or danger (usually accompanied by a desire to flee or fight)

words.translation: n. 打架, 争吵, 斗志；v. 对抗, 打架
words.definition: n. the act of fighting; any contest or struggle

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
words.definition: v. beat for the purpose of cleaning and thickening

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展
words.definition: v. become larger, greater, or bigger; expand or gain

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 金钱, 一笔款, 财富, 货币, 金额
words.definition: n. the most common medium of exchange; functions as legal tender

words.translation: n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 母亲, 修女院长；vt. 产生, 照看, 收养
words.definition: n. a woman who has given birth to a child (also used as a term of address to your mother)

words.translation: n. 人, 人身, 人称
words.definition: n. a human being

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 队, 组；vt. 把马(牛)套在同一辆车上, 把...编成一组
words.definition: n. a cooperative unit (especially in sports)

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 墙, 墙壁, 垣, 内壁, 分界物, 屏障；a. 墙的
words.definition: n. an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
words.definition: n. any immature animal

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 婴孩
words.definition: n. a very young child (birth to 1 year) who has not yet begun to walk or talk

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 饮料, 酒；v. 喝, 喝酒
words.definition: n. a single serving of a beverage

words.translation: a. 快速的, 紧的；adv. 很快地, 紧紧地, 彻底地
words.definition: n. abstaining from food

words.translation: n. 枪
words.definition: n. a weapon that discharges a missile at high velocity (especially from a metal tube or barrel)

words.translation: n. 国王, 君主；vt. 使...成为君主
words.definition: n. a male sovereign; ruler of a kingdom

words.translation: n. 失误, 避免, 失败, 小姐；vt. 未得到, 未达到, 未听到, 未觉察, 逃脱, 遗漏, 错过, 思念
words.definition: n. a failure to hit (or meet or find etc)

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: n. a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 王后, 女王；vt. 立为女王
words.definition: n. the only fertile female in a colony of social insects such as bees and ants and termites; its function is to lay eggs

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的
words.definition: n. poised for action

words.translation: n. 座, 座位, 位子, 席位, 所在地；vt. 使坐下, 使就座, 为...设座于, 使就职
words.definition: n. a space reserved for sitting (as in a theater or on a train or airplane)

words.translation: vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 歌, 曲, 鸣声, 歌唱, 歌曲, 诗歌
words.definition: n. a short musical composition with words

words.translation: n. 味道, 品味, 味觉, 感受, 体验, 爱好, 审美, 少量；vt. 尝, 察觉...的味道, 体会
words.definition: n. the sensation that results when taste buds in the tongue and throat convey information about the chemical composition of a soluble stimulus

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶
words.definition: n. a beverage made by steeping tea leaves in water

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 令人惊奇的, 奇妙的, 极好的
words.definition: s extraordinarily good or great; used especially as intensifiers

words.translation: prep. 包含, 包括
words.definition: v have as a part, be made up out of

words.translation: n. 较少, 较小；a. 少的, 小的
words.definition: a. (comparative of `little' usually used with mass nouns) a quantifier meaning not as great in amount or degree

words.translation: a. 古代的, 古老的, 年老的, 旧的
words.definition: n. a very old person

words.translation: n. 苹果, 家伙
words.definition: n. fruit with red or yellow or green skin and sweet to tart crisp whitish flesh

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: n. 蒙蔽物, 窗帘；a. 盲目的, 瞎的, 不加思考的
words.definition: n. people who have severe visual impairments, considered as a group

words.translation: n. 早餐
words.definition: n. the first meal of the day (usually in the morning)

words.translation: n. 盘子, 碟, 菜肴
words.definition: n. a piece of dishware normally used as a container for holding or serving food

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘

words.translation: a. 骄傲的, 自大的, 自豪的, 辉煌的, 壮丽的
words.definition: a. feeling self-respect or pleasure in something by which you measure your self-worth; or being a reason for pride

words.translation: n. 鞋, 靴, 外胎；vt. 给...穿鞋, 为马钉蹄铁

words.translation: n. 扫除, 打扫, 肃清, 视野, 范围, 全胜；vt. 扫除, 掸去, 猛拉, 扫荡, 肃清, 冲走, 刮起, 环视, 掠过, 扫射
words.definition: n. a wide scope

words.translation: n. 飞行, 射程, 逃走, 飞跃, 飞机航程, 班机, 迁徙, 飞逝；vi. 迁徙
words.definition: n. a formation of aircraft in flight

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. food and lodging provided in addition to money

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映

words.translation: n. 发射, 炮弹, 射击, 射手, 投篮, 射门, 子弹, 射程, 拍摄, 注射；vt. 装弹, 使成颗粒状
words.definition: n. a solid missile discharged from a firearm

words.translation: n. 皮肤, 皮；vt. 剥皮, 在...植皮

words.translation: num. 十, 十个

words.translation: num. 二十, 二十个

words.translation: n. 适宜, 合身, 发作, 痉挛；a. 适宜的, 对的, 准备好的

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活

words.translation: a. 短的, 近的, 矮的, 短期的, 简短的, 少量的；adv. 简短地, 突然

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒

words.translation: a. 楼上的；adv. 在楼上, 向楼上, 处于更高地位

words.translation: n. 平稳, 风平浪静；a. 平静的, 冷静的

words.translation: adv. 本来, 原来, 最初, 就起源而论, 独创地

words.translation: n. 贝壳, 壳, 外形, 炮弹；vt. 去壳, 脱落, 炮轰

words.translation: n. 狩猎, 猎狐, 探求

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: n. 鸭子；vi. 没入水中, 闪避

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员

words.translation: n. 晚餐

words.translation: n. 伦敦

words.translation: n. 安妮（女子名）
words.definition: n. Queen of England and Scotland and Ireland; daughter if James II and the last of the Stuart monarchs; in 1707 she was the last English ruler to exercise the r

words.translation: n. 盥洗室, 厕所, 嫖客
words.definition: n. youngest son of Henry II; King of England from 1199 to 1216; succeeded to the throne on the death of his brother Richard I; lost his French possessions; in 1

words.translation: a. 感激的；有责任的；必须的
words.definition: v force somebody to do something

words.translation: n. 理查德（男子名）
n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
